form.formComment: Could only manage fifth last time but the start prior hit the frame at double figure odds when second (19.51) over 340m at this track. Aided by the inside draw and in the mix on her best form.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Could only manage fifth last time but the start prior hit the frame at double figure odds when second (19.51) over 340m at this track. Aided by the inside draw and in the mix on her best form.

form.formComment: Hit the frame latest (17.61) when third at Richmond Straight in a Grade 4. Yet to win but has placed three times from this draw. With a clean break looks hard to beat.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Hit the frame latest (17.61) when third at Richmond Straight in a Grade 4. Yet to win but has placed three times from this draw. With a clean break looks hard to beat.

form.formComment: Improved sharply when second behind Ray Finkle at Goulburn last start over 350m (20.11). Has to be included.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Improved sharply when second behind Ray Finkle at Goulburn last start over 350m (20.11). Has to be included.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Shifted in shortly after the start and was checked.
At the start stumbled off the mats.
Shortly after the start came together.

form.formComment: Last start finished 3rd over 340m at this track beaten 4 lengths (19.61) behind Airflow Betty in a Grade 5 on March 31. Speedy conveyance who looks hard to beat.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Last start finished 3rd over 340m at this track beaten 4 lengths (19.61) behind Airflow Betty in a Grade 5 on March 31. Speedy conveyance who looks hard to beat.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: At first turn came together and forced very wide, losing momentum.
Began awkwardly and galloped ungainly throughout.

form.formComment: Facing tougher opposition than she has faced recent starts and current form just not to what is required to figure. Not going well enough to consider.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Facing tougher opposition than she has faced recent starts and current form just not to what is required to figure. Not going well enough to consider.

form.formComment: Came from wide draw and finished 5th over 365m at Nowra beaten 2 lengths (21.38) behind Cumbria Rich in a Grade 5 on March 30. Cannot enthuse on this occasion.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Came from wide draw and finished 5th over 365m at Nowra beaten 2 lengths (21.38) behind Cumbria Rich in a Grade 5 on March 30. Cannot enthuse on this occasion.

form.formComment: Returns from a ten weeks break and only other fresh up run was on debut when placed at big odds over 340m at this track. Has ability and worth including.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Returns from a ten weeks break and only other fresh up run was on debut when placed at big odds over 340m at this track. Has ability and worth including.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Checked off heels in the first turn and lost momentum.

form.formComment: Was out of placings last time (17.63) at Richmond Straight in a NG, finishing fourth and beaten 4.5 lengths. Goes very well from the draw boasting one victory and two places from four starts. Key chance and should go close.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Was out of placings last time (17.63) at Richmond Straight in a NG, finishing fourth and beaten 4.5 lengths. Goes very well from the draw boasting one victory and two places from four starts. Key chance and should go close.

form.formComment: Backs up after finishing 5th on April 9 over 324m at Richmond Straight in a Grade 5. Would be better placed in something easier.

formComments.comment: Backs up after finishing 5th on April 9 over 324m at Richmond Straight in a Grade 5. Would be better placed in something easier.
